title: Raw Friendly Peppery Silky Chicken Liver Salad
description: A raw-friendly, peppery and silky Norwegian dish featuring chicken liver as a solo dinner option.

ingredients.name: avocado
ingredients.notes: for a creamy texture and natural sweetness

ingredients.name: walnuts
ingredients.notes: pitted, lightly toasted to enhance flavor

ingredients.name: red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: to taste for a peppery kick

instructions: Slice the red onions thinly and place them in a bowl.
Dice the chicken livers into small pieces and add them to the onion mixture.
Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and finely dice it. Add to the onion and liver mixture.
Finely mince the ginger, then fold it into the salad along with the lime zest.
Add walnuts and red pepper flakes for texture and a peppery kick. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Serve immediately as a light dinner dish.
